positive: A minimalist and stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. The composition features stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a twilight sky. Focus on clean silhouettes and strong negative space. Include glowing mushroom clusters, ethereal hanging vines, and gentle cosmic mist swirling around the roots of oversized, stylized trees. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and glowing gold accents, with strong contrast between light and shadow. The style must be graphic novel aesthetic mixed with Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) influences, highly symmetrical, centered, and suitable for a central t-shirt print. Studio lighting, high detail, vector art quality.
negative: photorealistic, low quality, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, human, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, messy background
